# GitHub Discussions Categories Setup

## Categories to Add

### 1. Q&A 🙋
- **Name**: Q&A
- **Emoji**: 🙋
- **Description**: Ask questions and get help with Irium
- **Format**: Question/Answer
- **Why**: Most important - enables marking accepted answers

### 2. Mining ⛏️
- **Name**: Mining
- **Emoji**: ⛏️
- **Description**: Mining discussions, optimizations, and hardware recommendations
- **Format**: Open discussion
- **Why**: Core blockchain activity

### 3. Wallets & Transactions 💰
- **Name**: Wallets & Transactions
- **Emoji**: 💰
- **Description**: Wallet setup, transaction help, and address questions
- **Format**: Open discussion
- **Why**: Common user needs

### 4. Node Operations 🌐
- **Name**: Node Operations
- **Emoji**: 🌐
- **Description**: Running nodes, network infrastructure, and P2P discussions
- **Format**: Open discussion
- **Why**: Support node operators

## Final Category Structure

After adding these, you'll have:

1. 📢 **Announcements** (Announcement format - maintainers only)
2. 🙋 **Q&A** (Question/Answer format)
3. ⛏️ **Mining** (Open discussion)
4. 💰 **Wallets & Transactions** (Open discussion)
5. 🌐 **Node Operations** (Open discussion)
6. 💡 **Ideas** (Open discussion)
7. 📊 **General** (Open discussion)

## How to Add

1. Go to: https://github.com/iriumlabs/irium/discussions
2. Click the ⚙️ gear icon (top right)
3. Click "Edit categories"
4. Click "New category"
5. Fill in name, emoji, description, and format
6. Click "Create"
7. Repeat for each category

## Initial Posts to Create

After adding categories:

- **Q&A**: "How do I get started?" (first Q&A post)
- **Mining**: "Mining Setup & Tips" (already have template)
- **Wallets & Transactions**: "Wallet Setup Guide"
- **Node Operations**: "Node Operators Check-in" (already have template)

Templates are in `.github/DISCUSSION_TEMPLATES/`
